source_name: European Banking Authority
title: ​The EBA releases the final technical package for its 4.3 reporting framework to support Third-Country Branches reporting and AML Authority risk assessment data collection
clean_title: ​The EBA releases the final technical package for its 4.3 reporting framework to support Third-Country Branches reporting and AML Authority risk assessment data collection
summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published the final technical package for version 4.3 of its reporting framework. The package implements the new reporting requirements for Third-Country Branches (TCBs) under the Capital Requirements Directive (CRD) and supports the implementation of a risk assessment data collection exercise by the Anti-Money Laundering Authority (AMLA). ​
why_selected: Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.
impacts: Peut modifier la conformité, les reportings ou la gouvernance des acteurs financiers.

normalized_title: the eba releases the final technical package for its 4 3 reporting framework to support third country branches reporting and aml authority risk assessment data collection
